metadata.title: File Cleaner Redux
metadata.description: Help you to clean empty files and unused attachments in the vault.

regex.source: What happens to a file after it's deleted.
regex.target: 文件被删除后会发生什么.
"移动到黑曜石垃圾桶（.trash 文件夹）"
排除的 / 包括的文件夹

regex.source: "The folders below should be excluded from or included in the cleanup process."
regex.target: "下面的文件夹应该从清理过程中排除或包括在其中。"

regex.source: "Unused attachements which should be cleaned up, the `.*` wildcard can be used to select all extensions. Comma-separated."
regex.target: 清理的未使用附件，可以使用 .* 通配符来选择所有扩展名。用逗号分隔"

regex.source: List of frontmatter properties that should be ignored during cleanup.
regex.target: 在清理过程中应忽略的前言属性列表。

regex.source: If a file contains only frontmatter and contains only these properties, the file will be removed, comma-separated.
regex.target: 如果一个文件仅包含前言内容且仅包含这些属性，那么该文件将被移除，用逗号分隔。

regex.source: "Show a confirmation box with list of files to be removed"
regex.target: "显示一个带有待删除文件列表的确认框"
Description: "在启动时运行清理程序"

regex.source: Text: "Are you sure you want to reset the settings?"
regex.target: Text: "你确定要重置这些设置吗？"

regex.source: Folders that should be excluded during cleanup.
regex.target: 在清理过程中应排除的文件夹.

regex.source: Folders that should be included during cleanup, only these folders will be scanned
regex.target: 在清理过程中应该包含的文件夹，只有这些文件夹会被扫描
SettingsReset: "文件清理工具增强版：设置重置 "

regex.source: Supports regular expressions (wildcard matching can be done using
regex.target: 支持正则表达式（可以使用……来进行通配符匹配 ）

regex.source: Folders that should be excluded during cleanup, all other folders will be scanned.
regex.target: 在清理过程中应被排除在外的文件夹，其他所有文件夹都将被扫描。

regex.source: The attachment extensions below should be excluded from or included in the cleanup process.
regex.target: 以下附件的文件扩展名应在清理过程中被排除或包含在内。

regex.source: wildcard can be used to select all extensions. Comma-separated.
regex.target: 通配符可用于选择所有的扩展名，以逗号分隔。

regex.source: List of extensions that should be ignored during cleanup, all other files are included
regex.target: 在清理过程中应被忽略的扩展名列表，其他所有文件都包含在内。

regex.source: "List of extensions that should be included during cleanup, all other files are ignored,
regex.target: "在清理过程中应包含的扩展名列表，其他所有文件将被忽略。
删除空的 Markdown 文件

regex.source: Removes Markdown files if their size is 0
regex.target: 如果 Markdown 文件的大小为 0，则将其删除。

regex.source: Ignores all frontmatter, including the ones set above.
regex.target: 忽略所有的前置内容，包括上面设置的那些。

regex.source: List of codeblock-types that should be checked for attachments.
regex.target: 应检查其是否存在附件的代码块类型列表。

regex.source: "Resets the configuration back to default values"
